title: Precision Pout Lip Liner
body_html: sculpt, define, and contour with my precision pout lip liner. this new ultra-precise, wooden pencil makes it easy to create perfect lines and a fuller-looking pout. featuring a waxy texture and long-lasting formula, it grips onto lips for seamless, tug-free application, and stays put without smudging or feathering.
